steps.description: Click the text "How can you help me?" inside the message card in the vscuse_app_m4zltdev tab of the Microsoft Teams web interface.
Click the "Send" button (paper plane icon) in the Microsoft Teams chat interface to send the typed message.
Click the message input box at the bottom of the Microsoft Teams web interface to activate text entry for sending a message.
Press Enter to send the message "How can you help me?" in the chat input box of the bot conversation in Microsoft Teams (web interface).
Click the "View prompts" button at the bottom-right of the Microsoft Teams web chat interface to expand the available prompt options.
Press the Home key to move the cursor to the beginning of the message input box in the Microsoft Teams web chat interface.
Click the "View prompts" link in the message suggestions pop-up at the bottom right of the Microsoft Teams chat interface.
@assertion there is a visible prompt suggestion box in the bottom right area of the prompt card. In this suggestion box, the message 'How can you help me?' is clearly displayed.
Click the Chrome browser's close button (X) in the top-right corner to exit the Microsoft Teams chat window for vscuse_app_PuJobdev.
